scripts.remotion:still:hero: npm run remotion:prepare && node ./node_modules/@remotion/cli/remotion-cli.js still src/remotion/index.tsx HeroAutomationLoop public/animations/hero-automation-poster.png --frame=54 --overwrite
scripts.remotion:still:services: npm run remotion:prepare && node ./node_modules/@remotion/cli/remotion-cli.js still src/remotion/index.tsx ServicesOrbitLoop public/animations/services-orbit-poster.png --frame=45 --overwrite
scripts.remotion:render:hero: npm run remotion:prepare && node ./node_modules/@remotion/cli/remotion-cli.js render src/remotion/index.tsx HeroAutomationLoop public/animations/hero-automation.mp4 --codec=h264 --overwrite
scripts.remotion:render:services: npm run remotion:prepare && node ./node_modules/@remotion/cli/remotion-cli.js render src/remotion/index.tsx ServicesOrbitLoop public/animations/services-orbit.mp4 --codec=h264 --overwrite
scripts.remotion:render: npm run remotion:still:hero && npm run remotion:still:services && npm run remotion:render:hero && npm run remotion:render:services
